S.FORM: France (Ljinautian: France) ku mahan ta iyurupu. paris tjaljatalidu a lizuk nua i France. sihuciu : Emmanuel Macron kaian taqaljaqaljan pacunu uta == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: *ranʦə (ʎinautian: *ranʦə) ku mahan ta ijurupu. paris ʦaʎataɭidu a ɭizuk nua i *ranʦə. sihuʦiu : əmmanuəɭ maʦrun kaian taqaʎaqaʎan paʦunu uta == kaizuan ==
S.FORM: France (Ljinautian: France) ku mahan ta iyurupu. paris tjaljatalidu a lizuk nua i France. sihuciu : Emmanuel Macron kaian taqaljaqaljan pacunu uta == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: *ranʦə (ʎinautian: *ranʦə) ku mahan ta ijurupu. paris ʦaʎataɭidu a ɭizuk nua i *ranʦə. sihuʦiu : əmmanuəɭ maʦrun kaian taqaʎaqaʎan paʦunu uta == kaizuan ==
